HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

7// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
8// SymmetryOperation implementations
9// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
10Translation::Translation(rvec translationVector) : t(translationVector){};
11
12rvec Translation::Apply(rvec inputVector) {
13 rvec out(inputVector);
14 out -= t;
15 return out;
16}
17
18// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
19// Special function implementations
20// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
21// Error function erf(z) for complex arguments (series and asymptotics).
22dcmplx cerf(dcmplx arg) {
23 dcmplx c0, z1, result;
24 c0 = exp(-arg * arg);
25
26 if (arg.real() < 0)
27 z1 = -arg;
28 else
29 z1 = arg;
30
31 if (abs(arg) < 5.8) {
32 dcmplx cs = z1;
33 dcmplx cr = z1;
34 for (int k = 0; k < 120; k++) {
35 cr *= z1 * z1 / (k + 1.5);
36 cs += cr;
37 if (abs(cr / cs) < 1e-15) break;
38 }
39 result = 2. * c0 * cs / sqrt(PI);
40 } else {
41 dcmplx cl = 1. / z1;
42 dcmplx cr = cl;
43 for (int k = 0; k < 13; k++) {
44 cr *= -(k + 0.5) / (z1 * z1);
45 cl += cr;
46 if (abs(cr / cl) < 1e-15) break;
47 }
48 result = 1. - c0 * cl / sqrt(PI);
49 }
50
51 if (arg.real() < 0) return -result;
52
53 return result;
54}
55
56// Complementary error function erfc(z).
57dcmplx cerfc(dcmplx arg) {
58 dcmplx id(1., 0.);
59 return id - cerf(arg);
60}
61
62// Exponential integral Ei(x) for positive real x.
63double Ei(const double &x) {
64 double EI_TOLERANCE = 1e-9;
65 double EULER = 0.57721566490153;
66 int n;
67 double Ei, term;
68 Ei = 0.0;
69 if (x < 15.0) {
70 n = 1;
71 term = x;
72 Ei = EULER + log(x) + term;
73 while (fabs(term) > EI_TOLERANCE) {
74 term *= x * n / (n + 1) / (n + 1);
75 Ei += term;
76 n++;
77 }
78 }
79 return Ei;
80}
81
82// Exponential integral Ep(x,p) of order p.
83dcmplx Ep(const double &x, int p) {
84 int n(1);
85 dcmplx Ep;
86 if (x >= 0) {
87 double E1_TOLERANCE = 1e-9;
88 double EULER = 0.57721566490153;
89 int m;
90 double E1, term;
91 E1 = 0.0;
92 if (x < 15.0) {
93 m = 1;
94 term = -x;
95 E1 = -EULER - log(x) - term;
96 while (fabs(term) > E1_TOLERANCE) {
97 term *= -x * m / (m + 1) / (m + 1);
98 E1 -= term;
99 m++;
100 }
101 }
102 Ep = E1;
103 } else {
104 Ep = -Ei(-x) + I * PI;
105 }
106 while (n < p) {
107 Ep = 1. / n * (exp(-x) - x * Ep);
108 ++n;
109 }
110 return Ep;
111}
112
113// Compute factorial of integer n.
114int factorial(int num) {
115 int result(1);
116 for (int i = 1; i <= num; ++i) result *= i;
117 return result;
118}
119
120// Transpose of a complex dyadic (3x3 matrix).
121cdyad transpose(cdyad d) {
122 return cdyad(cvec(d(0)(0), d(1)(0), d(2)(0)), cvec(d(0)(1), d(1)(1), d(2)(1)),
123 cvec(d(0)(2), d(1)(2), d(2)(2)));
124}
125
126// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
127// Table generation routines
128// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
129// Generate and save text lookup table of cerfc values.
130int ErfcLookupTable(std::string filename, double maxRe, double maxIm,
131 double incRe, double incIm) {
132 dcmplx z;
133 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx> > erfcTable;
134 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx> > posTable;
135 std::cout << "Computing look-up table" << std::endl;
136 for (double x = -maxRe; x <= maxRe; x += incRe) {
137 std::cout << "." << std::flush;
138 std::vector<dcmplx> buffer, buffer1;
139 for (double y = -maxIm; y <= maxIm; y += incIm) {
140 z = x + I * y;
141 buffer.push_back(cerfc(z));
142 buffer1.push_back(z);
143 }
144 erfcTable.push_back(buffer);
145 posTable.push_back(buffer1);
146 }
147 std::ofstream outputFile(filename.c_str());
148 std::cout << "finished...writing file " << filename << std::endl;
149 if (!outputFile.is_open()) {
150 std::cout << "Error opening erfc output file: " << filename << std::endl;
151 return 1;
152 }
153 outputFile << "# Look-up table for erfc function" << std::endl;
154 outputFile << "# Table parameters: size along x, size along y" << std::endl;
155 outputFile << erfcTable.size() << " " << erfcTable[0].size() << std::endl;
156 outputFile << "# Table: x, y, re(erfc(x+iy)),im(erfc(x+iy))" << std::endl;
157 for (unsigned int i(0); i < erfcTable.size(); ++i) {
158 for (unsigned int j(0); j < erfcTable[i].size(); ++j) {
159 outputFile << posTable[i][j] << " " << erfcTable[i][j] << std::endl;
160 }
161 }
162 outputFile.close();
163 return 0;
164}
165
166// Construct LookupTable from text file.
167LookupTable::LookupTable()
168 : sizeRe(0), sizeIm(0), maxRe(0), maxIm(0), incRe(0), incIm(0) {}
169
170// Construct LookupTable from text file.
171LookupTable::LookupTable(std::string fileName) {
172 std::ifstream fin(fileName.c_str());
173 if (!fin.is_open()) {
174 std::cout << "Error opening look-up table file: " << fileName << std::endl;
175 }
176 dcmplx z;
177 int err = ReadCommented<int>(&fin, &sizeRe);
178 err += ReadCommented<int>(&fin, &sizeIm);
179 for (int i(0); i < sizeRe; ++i) {
180 std::vector<dcmplx> buffer, buffer1;
181 for (int j(0); j < sizeIm; ++j) {
182 err += ReadCommented<dcmplx>(&fin, &z);
183 buffer1.push_back(z);
184 err += ReadCommented<dcmplx>(&fin, &z);
185 buffer.push_back(z);
186 }
187 fun.push_back(buffer);
188 arg.push_back(buffer1);
189 }
190 maxRe = -real(arg[0][0]);
191 maxIm = -imag(arg[0][0]);
192 incRe = real(arg[1][0] - arg[0][0]);
193 incIm = imag(arg[0][1] - arg[0][0]);
194 fin.close();
195}
196
197// Generate and save binary lookup table of cerfc values.
198int ErfcLookupTableBin(std::string filename, double maxRe, double maxIm,
199 double incRe, double incIm) {
200 dcmplx z;
201 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx> > erfcTable;
202 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx> > posTable;
203 std::cout << "Computing look-up table" << std::endl;
204 for (double x = -maxRe; x <= maxRe; x += incRe) {
205 std::cout << "." << std::flush;
206 std::vector<dcmplx> buffer, buffer1;
207 for (double y = -maxIm; y <= maxIm; y += incIm) {
208 z = x + I * y;
209 buffer.push_back(cerfc(z));
210 buffer1.push_back(z);
211 }
212 erfcTable.push_back(buffer);
213 posTable.push_back(buffer1);
214 }
215 std::cout << "finished...writing file " << filename << std::endl;
216
217 FILE* fp = fopen(filename.c_str(), "wb");
218 if (fp==NULL) {
219 std::cout << "Error opening erfc output file: " << filename << std::endl;
220 return 1;
221 }
222 int temp = erfcTable.size();
223 fwrite(&temp, sizeof(int), 1, fp);
224 temp = erfcTable[0].size();
225 fwrite(&temp, sizeof(int), 1, fp);
226 double temp2;
227 for (unsigned int i(0); i < erfcTable.size(); ++i) {
228 for (unsigned int j(0); j < erfcTable[i].size(); ++j) {
229 temp2 = posTable[i][j].real();
230 fwrite(&temp2, sizeof(double), 1, fp);
231 temp2 = posTable[i][j].imag();
232 fwrite(&temp2, sizeof(double), 1, fp);
233 temp2 = erfcTable[i][j].real();
234 fwrite(&temp2, sizeof(double), 1, fp);
235 temp2 = erfcTable[i][j].imag();
236 fwrite(&temp2, sizeof(double), 1, fp);
237 }
238 }
239 fclose(fp);
240 return 0;
241}
242
243// Construct LookupTable from bin file.
244LookupTableBin::LookupTableBin()
245 : sizeRe(0), sizeIm(0), maxRe(0), maxIm(0), incRe(0), incIm(0) {}
246
247// Construct LookupTable from bin file.
248LookupTableBin::LookupTableBin(std::string fileName) {
249
250 FILE* fp = fopen(fileName.c_str(), "rb");
251
252 double temp1,temp2;
253 dcmplx z;
254
255 if (fp==NULL) {
256 std::cout << "Error opening look-up table file: " << fileName << std::endl;
257 }
258
259 int err = fread(&sizeRe, sizeof(int), 1, fp);
260 err += fread(&sizeIm, sizeof(int), 1, fp);
261
262 for (int i(0); i < sizeRe; ++i) {
263 std::vector<dcmplx> buffer, buffer1;
264 for (int j(0); j < sizeIm; ++j) {
265 err += fread(&temp1, sizeof(double), 1, fp);
266 err += fread(&temp2, sizeof(double), 1, fp);
267 z = temp1 + I * temp2;
268 buffer1.push_back(z);
269 err += fread(&temp1, sizeof(double), 1, fp);
270 err += fread(&temp2, sizeof(double), 1, fp);
271 z = temp1 + I * temp2;
272 buffer.push_back(z);
273 }
274 fun.push_back(buffer);
275 arg.push_back(buffer1);
276 }
277 maxRe = -real(arg[0][0]);
278 maxIm = -imag(arg[0][0]);
279 incRe = real(arg[1][0] - arg[0][0]);
280 incIm = imag(arg[0][1] - arg[0][0]);
281 fclose(fp);
282}
